title: Lodhran Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lodhran with a Z-Score of +4.43. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Lodhran is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 37%, and wind speed is moderate at 13.5 km/h. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of heat stress, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
